title: Sachiya Mata Temple
tagline: Sachiya Mata Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: The Sachchiya Mata Temple is located in Osian, near Jodhpur city in the Indian state of Rajasthan.
overview.description: The Sachchiya Mata Temple is located in Osian, near Jodhpur city in the Indian state of Rajasthan. The goddess Sachiya (also spelled as Sachayay Mata and Sachchiyay Mata, Hindi: सच्चियाय माता/सच्चिया माता) is worshipped by many castes and communities living in Rajasthan, Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh and North India. The deity is also called as Shri Osiya Mataji. Osiya was once a large town.

topPlaces.name: Belwa
topPlaces.description: Belwa is a village in Jodhpur district of Rajasthan. It is 80 km away from the district headquarter.

topPlaces.name: Balesar Durgawatan
topPlaces.description: Balesar Durgawatan is a panchayat village in the state of Rajasthan, India, Administratively, Balesar Durgawatan is under Balesar tehsil of Jodhpur District in Rajasthan. There are two villages in the Balesar Durgawatan gram panchayat: Balesar Durgawatan and Deonagar.

topPlaces.name: Balesar
topPlaces.description: Balesar Satan is a village in Jodhpur district, Rajasthan, India. It is a panchayat village and headquarters of the Balesar tehsil.

items.note: Belwa is a village in Jodhpur district of Rajasthan. It is 80 km away from the district headquarter.

Balesar Durgawatan is a panchayat village in the state of Rajasthan, India, Administratively, Balesar Durgawatan is under Balesar tehsil of Jodhpur District in Rajasthan. There are two villages in the Balesar Durgawatan gram panchayat: Balesar Durgawatan and Deonagar.
Balesar Satan is a village in Jodhpur district, Rajasthan, India. It is a panchayat village and headquarters of the Balesar tehsil.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sachiya Mata Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sachiya Mata Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sachiya Mata Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jodhpur Airport (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Jodhpur Junction (50 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sachiya Mata Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sachiya Mata Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sachiya Mata Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sachiya Mata Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sachiya Mata Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Belwa, Balesar Durgawatan, Balesar.
